nasb.text: “When a person sins and acts unfaithfully against the Lord, and deceives his companion in regard to a deposit or a security entrusted to him, or through robbery, or if he has extorted from his companion,

esv.text: “If anyone sins and commits a breach of faith against the Lord by deceiving his neighbor in a matter of deposit or security, or through robbery, or if he has oppressed his neighbor

cnv.text: “如果有人犯罪，對耶和華不忠實，在人寄存給他的物上或抵押品上欺騙自己的同伴，或是搶奪，或是欺壓自己的同胞，

ccb.text: “如果有人犯罪，不忠于耶和华，拒绝归还同胞委托他保管的物品或抵押品，或抢掠同胞，或欺骗同胞，
